title: Israeli Forces Move Deeper into Southern Lebanon
subtitle: The capture of a historic castle marks the deepest military advance in over two decades, raising concerns about regional stability.

summary.en: Israeli military forces have taken control of the historic Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon. This move represents the deepest entry of Israeli troops into the country in 26 years. The expansion of the conflict continues to ignore a ceasefire agreement that was meant to stop the fighting. More than 1.2 million people have been forced to leave their homes since the current tensions began. International leaders are now calling for an urgent meeting to address the growing crisis.
summary.zh: 以色列軍隊已控制黎巴嫩南部歷史悠久的博福特城堡。此舉代表以色列軍隊二十六年來深入該國境內最遠的一次行動。衝突的擴大持續無視旨在停止戰鬥的停火協議。自當前緊張局勢開始以來，已有超過一百二十萬人被迫離開家園。國際領袖現正呼籲召開緊急會議，以解決日益嚴峻的危機。

paragraphs.en: Israeli military forces have captured a historic clifftop castle in southern Lebanon, marking their deepest movement into the country in more than 26 years. The capture of Beaufort Castle, a 900-year-old site, comes after days of intense fighting and air strikes in the area. According to The Guardian, the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) stated that the operation aims to remove Hezbollah infrastructure and increase control over the region.
paragraphs.zh: 以色列軍隊已攻佔黎巴嫩南部一座歷史悠久的懸崖城堡，這是該國軍隊二十六年多以來深入黎巴嫩境內最遠的一次行動。這座擁有九百年歷史的博福特城堡（Beaufort Castle）是在經歷數日的激烈戰鬥與空襲後被攻佔。根據《衛報》（The Guardian）報導，以色列國防軍（IDF）表示，此項行動旨在清除真主黨（Hezbollah）的基礎設施，並加強對該地區的控制。

paragraphs.en: Beaufort Castle is a well-known historical site that offers a clear view of much of southern Lebanon and northern Israel. Because of its location, it has been a target in many battles over the last few decades. Israel previously held the castle during its long occupation of southern Lebanon, which lasted from 1982 until 2000. Today, the sight of Israeli flags flying over the stone walls serves as a powerful symbol of the current military push.
paragraphs.zh: 博福特城堡是一處著名的歷史遺址，從該處可以清晰俯瞰黎巴嫩南部與以色列北部的大部分地區。由於其地理位置特殊，過去幾十年來一直是多次戰役的目標。以色列在過去長期佔領黎巴嫩南部期間（從一九八二年持續至二〇〇〇年）曾控制過這座城堡。如今，以色列國旗在石牆上飄揚的景象，成為了當前軍事推進強而有力的象徵。

paragraphs.en: This new development has further weakened a ceasefire—an agreement to stop fighting—that was supported by the United States. Although this truce was officially meant to start in April, it has not been followed by either side. NPR reports that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has promised to "crush" Hezbollah, a militant group supported by Iran. At the same time, the Lebanese government continues to demand an immediate end to the fighting and a full withdrawal of Israeli troops.
paragraphs.zh: 這項最新進展進一步削弱了由美國支持的停火協議。儘管該協議原定於四月正式生效，但雙方皆未遵守。根據美國國家公共廣播電台（NPR）報導，以色列總理納坦雅胡（Benjamin Netanyahu）已誓言要「粉碎」伊朗支持的武裝團體真主黨。與此同時，黎巴嫩政府持續要求立即停止戰鬥，並要求以色列軍隊全面撤離。

paragraphs.en: The human cost of this conflict is very high. According to NPR, more than 1.2 million people have been forced to leave their homes due to the fighting. The Lebanese ministry of public health reported that over 3,300 people have been killed, including women, children, and first responders. In contrast, Israel has reported that 23 soldiers, one military contractor, and two civilians have died in attacks by Hezbollah.
paragraphs.zh: 這場衝突帶來了極高的人道代價。根據 NPR 報導，由於戰火延燒，已有超過一百二十萬人被迫流離失所。黎巴嫩公共衛生部報告指出，死亡人數已超過三千三百人，其中包括婦女、兒童與第一線救難人員。相較之下，以色列方面則報告稱，在真主黨的攻擊中，已有二十三名士兵、一名軍事承包商及兩名平民喪生。

paragraphs.en: International leaders are expressing deep concern regarding these events. The French foreign minister, Jean-Noël Barrot, has requested an emergency meeting of the United Nations Security Council. He described the ongoing military operations in Lebanon as unacceptable, stating that there is no justification for the deep occupation of Lebanese territory.
paragraphs.zh: 國際領袖對這些事件表達了深切擔憂。法國外交部長巴霍（Jean-Noël Barrot）已要求召開聯合國安全理事會緊急會議。他形容目前在黎巴嫩進行的軍事行動令人無法接受，並表示深入佔領黎巴嫩領土毫無正當理由。

paragraphs.en: Experts suggest that the current military strategy may be about more than just security. Professor Yagil Levy, from the Open University of Israel, noted that the capture of the castle might be a "victory of image." He explained that Israeli officials are under pressure to show results to the public, as many people in Israel feel the country is not winning the conflict. Furthermore, there is growing criticism within the Israeli military regarding the safety of soldiers, who face constant threats from drone attacks.
paragraphs.zh: 專家認為，目前的軍事策略可能不僅僅是為了安全考量。以色列開放大學（Open University of Israel）教授列維（Yagil Levy）指出，攻佔城堡可能是一種「形象上的勝利」。他解釋說，以色列官員面臨必須向大眾展示成果的壓力，因為許多以色列民眾認為國家並未在這場衝突中獲勝。此外，以色列軍方內部對於士兵安全的批評聲浪日益高漲，因為士兵們正面臨無人機攻擊的持續威脅。

paragraphs.en: This expansion of the war also complicates wider diplomatic efforts. Iran has made it clear that any deal to end the conflict in Iran must also include a stop to the fighting in Lebanon. Observers believe that Israeli commanders want to cause as much damage as possible to Hezbollah before any new international agreements are made.
paragraphs.zh: 戰爭的擴大也使更廣泛的外交努力變得更加複雜。伊朗已明確表示，任何結束衝突的協議都必須包含停止在黎巴嫩的戰鬥。觀察家認為，以色列指揮官希望在任何新的國際協議達成之前，盡可能對真主黨造成最大程度的破壞。

paragraphs.en: As the fighting continues, the situation remains dangerous for civilians. Israeli forces are now moving toward the city of Nabatieh, which is an important economic and cultural center for the region. Many people in the area have been ordered to leave their homes as the military operation expands. While the Lebanese government has stated that it wants to disarm Hezbollah and replace it with national army forces, it currently lacks the power to do so. Hezbollah, meanwhile, has declared that it will not give up its weapons while Lebanon is under attack. With both sides continuing to blame each other for breaking the truce, there is no clear path to peace in the near future.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著戰事持續，平民的處境依然險象環生。以色列軍隊目前正向納巴提耶市（Nabatieh）推進，該市是該地區重要的經濟與文化中心。隨著軍事行動擴大，該地區許多民眾已被下令撤離家園。雖然黎巴嫩政府表示希望解除真主黨的武裝，並以國家軍隊取而代之，但目前缺乏執行能力。與此同時，真主黨宣稱在黎巴嫩遭受攻擊期間，絕不會放棄武裝。由於雙方持續指責對方破壞停火協議，短期內和平之路仍遙遙無期。

keyTerms.definitionEn: A determined effort to achieve something, especially in a military or political context.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（推），這裡作名詞，指軍事上的進攻行動。文中：Today, the sight of Israeli flags flying over the stone walls serves as a powerful symbol of the current military push.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To defeat someone or something completely.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作物理上的「壓碎」，這裡指軍事上的徹底擊敗。文中：NPR reports that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has promised to "crush" Hezbollah, a militant group supported by Iran.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To take weapons away from someone or a group.
keyTerms.noteZh: 由字首 dis-（除去）加上 arm（武器/武裝）組成，容易誤以為是單純的「手臂」相關詞彙。文中：While the Lebanese government has stated that it wants to disarm Hezbollah and replace it with national army forces, it currently lacks the power to do so.

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Israel seizes strategic castle in deepest incursion into Lebanon in 26 years

sources.name: NPR News
sources.title: Israel seizes medieval castle as it expands major offensive in southern Lebanon

quiz.question: What is the significance of the Israeli forces capturing Beaufort Castle in the context of their recent military history?

options.A: It is the first time Israel has controlled this castle since 1982.
options.B: It represents the furthest advancement into Lebanon in over 26 years.
options.C: It marks the final step in the complete destruction of Hezbollah infrastructure.
options.D: It is the first military operation conducted by Israel in southern Lebanon.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第一段，以色列軍隊佔領 Beaufort Castle 標誌著他們 26 年多以來在黎巴嫩境內推進最深的一次。選項 A 錯誤，因為以色列在 1982 年至 2000 年期間已經佔領過該城堡，並非首次。選項 C 錯誤，文中僅提到這是為了「增加控制」，並未表示這是最後一步或已完全摧毀基礎設施。選項 D 錯誤，文章提到以色列在 1982 年至 2000 年間曾長期佔領該地區，因此這並非首次軍事行動。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why might Israeli officials be particularly focused on the 'image' of capturing the castle?

options.A: To prove to the United Nations that the ceasefire was unnecessary.
options.B: To distract the public from the high number of Israeli civilian casualties.
options.C: To demonstrate progress to an Israeli public that feels the conflict is not being won.
options.D: To secure a strategic location that will definitely end the drone attacks on soldiers.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第六段，Yagil Levy 教授指出，佔領城堡可能是一種「形象的勝利」，因為以色列官員面臨公眾壓力，需要展現成果，因為許多以色列人認為國家在衝突中並未取得優勢。選項 A 錯誤，文中並未提到這是為了向聯合國證明停火無效。選項 B 錯誤，雖然衝突有傷亡，但文章強調的是公眾對「戰局進展」的質疑，而非單純掩蓋傷亡數字。選項 D 錯誤，文中提到士兵仍面臨無人機威脅，並未暗示佔領城堡能解決此問題。

quiz.question: In the context of the article, what does the word 'crush' mean when Prime Minister Netanyahu promises to 'crush' Hezbollah?

options.A: To physically press something into a flat shape.
options.B: To completely defeat or destroy an opposing force.
options.C: To negotiate a peaceful end to a difficult situation.
options.D: To ignore the existence of a rival group.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在文中，Netanyahu 誓言要「crush」Hezbollah，這裡的用法是比喻性的，意指徹底擊敗或摧毀敵對勢力。選項 A 是該詞的字面意義（壓扁），在軍事語境中不適用。選項 C 與「crush」的強硬意涵完全相反。選項 D 錯誤，因為「crush」代表的是主動的軍事行動，而非消極的忽視。此詞在此處強調的是軍事打擊的強度與決心。

quiz.question: Which of the following best summarizes the central theme of the article?

options.A: The historical importance of Beaufort Castle in Middle Eastern architecture.
options.B: The successful implementation of a ceasefire agreement supported by the U.S.
options.C: The escalating conflict between Israel and Hezbollah and its complex, dangerous consequences.
options.D: The urgent need for the Lebanese government to disarm Hezbollah immediately.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。整篇文章從軍事行動、外交困境、人道危機到政治壓力，全面探討了以色列與真主黨之間衝突的升級及其帶來的複雜後果。選項 A 僅是文章開頭提到的背景細節，非主旨。選項 B 錯誤，文中明確指出停火協議並未被遵守，處於失效狀態。選項 D 雖然在最後一段提到，但這只是衝突中涉及的眾多議題之一，並非文章探討的核心主旨。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
